info.description: Platform for school students and IT/robotics event organizers.
info.title: EventApp API

get.description: Returns aggregated stats: total users, events, registrations, pending organizers, recent audit actions.
Paginated, filterable user list. Filters: role, approved, blocked, search.

patch.description: Prevents the user from logging in. Cannot block admins.
Changes a user's role. Cannot promote to admin.

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of events. Supports advanced filters.

post.description: Only approved organizers may create events. A unique checkin_token is generated automatically.

get.description: Returns event details including free seats and favorite status for the caller.

put.description: Only the approved organizer who created the event can update it.

delete.description: Only the approved organizer who created the event can delete it.

post.description: Creates a registration. If seats available → pending. If full → waitlisted. Duplicate → 409.

get.description: Returns an .ics file that can be imported into any calendar app
get.summary: Download ICS calendar file for an event

get.description: Returns all registrations. Caller must be the event organizer.
Downloads participant list as CSV. Organizer/admin only.
Returns the full enriched profile of the authenticated user, including interests and privacy settings

put.description: Partially updates the authenticated user's profile. Only provided fields are changed.

get.description: Returns all event registrations for the current user with event details
Returns recent notifications for the authenticated user

delete.description: User cancels their own pending/approved/waitlisted registration. If an approved seat is freed, the next waitlisted user is auto-promoted.

patch.description: Validates the QR HMAC and transitions approved → checked_in. Organizer only.
patch.summary: Check in a participant via QR code

get.description: Returns the QR payload string for the user's approved registration. Used by iOS to generate QR code.
get.summary: Get QR payload for a registration

patch.description: Organizer changes registration status. Enforces state-machine transitions.

get.description: Returns a structured attendance report with status breakdown. Organizer/admin only.
Downloads attendance as CSV with participant details and status. Organizer/admin only.
Returns aggregated stats for all events belonging to the authenticated organizer: participant counts, fill rate, check-in rate.
Downloads the organizer summary as CSV.

post.description: Accepts a multipart file upload (jpg/png, max 5MB). Returns the public URL.
Authenticates a user and returns access + refresh tokens
Revokes the given refresh token. The access token remains valid until it expires.

Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair (rotation).
The old refresh token is revoked. Send the current access token in the Authorization header
(even if expired) so the server can identify the user.

Creates a student or organizer account and returns access + refresh tokens.
Organizer accounts require admin approval before they can create events.
